codeReview.summary: The feature now satisfies its scoped contract. Runtime parsing remains syntax-based and table-agnostic in parse_record_link_string, ordinary colon strings are proven to remain plain payloads across save(), get(), and Repo::get_record(), and the earlier blocking evidence gap has been fixed by the follow-up regression in core/tests/integration_db.rs.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-library-worker procedure still lacks a safe, explicit path for detached-head missions that already contain unrelated staged artifacts before the worker starts committing.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff C:\Users\admin\.factory\missions\fb36f232-36a4-4e47-b2c9-192ab540f0fc\handoffs\2026-03-23T20-30-11-364Z__milestone-c-strict-record-link-string-classification-get-record-proof__35a38818-bed4-4fc4-894e-590285209e95.json records followedProcedure=false because commit f2f2a40 inherited pre-staged .factory artifacts; git show --stat f2f2a40 confirms those unrelated files were included alongside core/tests/integration_db.rs.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the original failed review, the fix-review artifacts, commit history for the feature (7c69d7a, 3e529fa, f2f2a40), the updated runtime parsing seam, and the final regression in core/tests/integration_db.rs. The original get_record evidence gap is closed, and I found no remaining blocking or non-blocking code issues within this feature scope.
